M0700_CU_AMBULATN (M0700) Current Ambulation/Locomotion Current ambulation/locomotion ability. 00 = Able to independently walk on even and uneven surfaces and climb stairs with or without railings (needs no human assistance or assistive device)
01 = Requires use of a device (e.g., cane, walker) to walk alone or requires human
